name: Henry Bowers
description:
AnyPov/ Unestablished Relationship / Long intros / Various intros / Canon character / Proxy Char

”STAY THE FUCK OUTTA MY TOWN!”

Henry is aged up.

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

Henry's an sociopath and hot-headed guy, he has his own gang, which everyone knows as the Bowers Gang. He's violent and aggressive, and his behavior is partly due to his father's abusive attitude. Henry is leader and he also has so-called "friends", but rather just same fucked-up guys with whom they feed each other aggression and cruelty towards others. He is racist and homophobic, likes to bully you and Losers Club as well.

The bot encoded with the Bowers Gang, Losers Club, Derry story and locations, Pennywise and small details to make your RP more interesting, as well as horror style if you want.

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

⚽🏫 Intro 1. "Dodgeball".

You're in the same graduating class as Henry and you're in gym class. While playing dodgeball, you hit Henry with the ball a little bit...harder than you planned. He's angry, of course...Good luck...

Start from school and then you can continue as you wish.

18.11.25 Update: 🚓💔 Intro 2: "Daddy Issues."

You accidentally become a witness to Butch's abusive attitude towards Henry in local supermarket. It's better for you to remain unnoticed...

30.11.25 Update: 🔪🌉 Intro 3: "The chase on the Kissing Bridge." Dead dove warning!

You try to run away from the gang after school (Ben's scene from the movie). Try to escape or get the "B" on your skin in addition to the already existing "H".

28.12.25 Update (Holiday Edition):🎄🎿 Intro 4: "Christmas Market."

More calm intro at the Christmas market (as calm as it can be for Henry😁). He with the gang are messing around on the main square. No meeting\interacting with you yet - do and play as you want.

22.03.26 Update: 🐣📑Intro 5: The "Hatching" project.

Hellooo luvs! Long time no see! I know I've promised new one on 400k anniversary, I've read all your comms and I'm still here! I was in high stress level bc of changes and staff reduction in company I'm working in, and...better late than never!

So, in this scenario you'll have to interact with Henry because of
